creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 151619
Patch against games/wesnoth

The recent version in ports is more than 1,5 years old. I've wrote a patch to update to the most recent version. This is the biggest port i ever worked on, so i had only touch most thinks to get it work.

I also contacted the maintainer, which said, that he do not have time for the port and dropped maintainership in December last year. Therefore i will take the maintainership.
